response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering with a strong background in full-stack development, infrastructure, and AI-agent infrastructure, meeting the minimum 15-year requirement. However, his focus appears more generalized in software craftsmanship rather than deep AI expertise, and his entrepreneurial work (GISCollective) is not directly aligned with cloud/AI platform strategy. His leadership and technical breadth are notable, but specific AI product-building experience is less evident.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering and leadership experience with a strong technical toolkit (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Kubernetes)
Proven ability to contribute to AI-related infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) and optimize systems
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) demonstrating initiative and product development skills
concerns: Limited direct experience with AI-specific products or platforms as a primary focus area
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, which is preferred
Current role at re:cinq is recent (since April 2025), so long-term impact is unproven

key_factors.factor: Cloud or AI expertise with builder, code, and design fluency
